title: polystichum controversum
intro: Polystichum controversum, also known as the silver fern or autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae) native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Polystichum controversum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
